headline: Kraft Heinz plan to close NZ factories “devastating”, union says
summary: The proposed closures would bring production of Wattie’s frozen vegetables to an end, alongside Gregg’s coffee.

raw.headline: Kraft Heinz plan to close NZ factories “devastating”, union says
raw.summary: The proposed closures would bring production of Wattie’s frozen vegetables to an end, alongside Gregg’s coffee.

headline: Young Africans score higher than Americans on 'mind health,' new study finds: Wealth ‘not an indicator’ of well-being
summary: A new Sapien Labs study found that young people in Ghana and Nigeria are much more able to function than those in the U.S.

raw.headline: Young Africans score higher than Americans on 'mind health,' new study finds: Wealth ‘not an indicator’ of well-being
raw.summary: A new Sapien Labs study found that young people in Ghana and Nigeria are much more able to function than those in the U.S.
